creator: coppolajj@gmail.com
text:
I tried these suggested settings:

ifconfig_em0="up"
wlans_iwn0="wlan0"
ifconfig_wlan0="ether 00:1c:25:9d:ec:60 WPA"
cloned_interfaces="lagg0"
ifconfig_lagg0="laggproto failover laggport em0 laggport wlan0 DHCP"

but there is no improvement, I still get the  messages like:
"iwn0: iwn_read_firmware: ucode rev=0x08530501" and wlan0's link state going UP and DOWN numerous times.
